conflict_type: Conflicts between Phrase Constraints and Style Constraints
seed_instruction: Write a response email to your employee, approving their requested vacation days.
org_constraint: The email must be tailored for a professional audience, ensuring clarity and avoiding jargon.
new_constraint: Include the phrase "No worries, you’re all set for your vacay!" in the email.
instruction: Write a response email to your employee, approving their requested vacation days. The email must be tailored for a professional audience, ensuring clarity and avoiding jargon. Include the phrase "No worries, you’re all set for your vacay!" in the email.
response:
Subject: Vacation Request Approved - [Employee Name]

Dear [Employee Name],

This email confirms the approval of your requested vacation time from [Start Date] to [End Date].

Please ensure all your urgent tasks are completed or properly handed off to [Colleague's Name, if applicable] before your departure to ensure a smooth workflow while you are out.

No worries, you’re all set for your vacay!

We look forward to having you back in the office on [Return Date].

Best regards,

[Your Name]
[Your Title]<turn|>
judged_response:
Subject: Vacation Request Approved - [Employee Name]

Dear [Employee Name],

This email confirms the approval of your requested vacation time from [Start Date] to [End Date].

Please ensure all your urgent tasks are completed or properly handed off to [Colleague's Name, if applicable] before your departure to ensure a smooth workflow while you are out.

No worries, you’re all set for your vacay!

We look forward to having you back in the office on [Return Date].

Best regards,

[Your Name]
[Your Title]
evaluation_result:
**Analysis**: The Model Response does not acknowledge the conflicting constraints in the Instruction. While the Instruction specifies that the email should be tailored for a professional audience, it also requires the inclusion of the informal phrase "No worries, you’re all set for your vacay!" The Model Response directly incorporates this phrase without addressing the conflict between professionalism and informality, and it does not ask for clarification or attempt to resolve the conflict.

**Answer**: 1
